channel.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Dec 23rd - Dec 29th, 2019
item.description:
Resources

Code examples

  • Android Modular Architecturestars1.8k - Android Sample App using modular, clean, scalable, testable Architecture written in Kotlin following the best practices with Jetpack.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Oct 21st - Oct 27th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

Runtime Permissions

  • Ask-Permissionstars75 - Simple RunTime permission manager.
  • Gotastars73 - Simplifying Android Permissions.
  • EasyPermissionsstars9.1k - EasyPermissions is a wrapper library to simplify basic system permissions logic when targeting Android M or higher.

    • Libraries

    Chat & Messaging

  • Stream Chat - Comprehensive SDK & Components for real-time chat, powered by Stream.

    • Resources

    Podcasts

  • Talking Kotlin - A Podcast on Kotlin and more.
  • Android Authority is a weekly Android podcast hosted by Adam Doud, Joe Hindy, and Jonathan Feist from the Android Authority team.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Oct 14th - Oct 20th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

Data binding

  • Anvilstars1.4k - A small library to create reactive UI components, inspired by React. Provides data binding and event listener binding, fits well for MVVM.

    • Libraries

    Inputs

  • EmojiCompatstars708 - Adds emoticons to your app

    • Resources

    Code examples

  • Android Architecture Blueprintsstars38.7k - The Android Architecture Blueprints project demonstrates strategies to help solve or avoid common android problems.

    • Libraries

    Media Picker

  • Android Image Pickerstars866 - A library that makes images and videos selection from gallery feels easy. It also support GIF and simple camera action

    • Libraries

    Loading Images

  • Coilstars6.2k - Image loading for Android backed by Kotlin Coroutines.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Oct 7th - Oct 13th, 2019
item.description:
Resources

Code examples

  • Complete-Google-Map-API-Tutorialstars105 - Learn How to use Google Map API for Android from Basic to Advance with complete examples.

    • Resources

    Podcasts

  • Fragmented is the Android developer podcast where Donn Felker and Kaushik Gopal talk about building good software and becoming better Android developers.
  • Android Central - is a weekly Android podcast hosted by the Android Central team.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Sep 30th - Oct 6th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

Chat & Messaging

  • Add Push Notifications to Your Android Chat App Using Kotlin - Add push notifications in your Android chat apps in Kotlin with the help of CometChat Pro and Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM).

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Aug 19th - Aug 25th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

GUI

  • OneAdapterstars328 - RecyclerView Adapter with multiple modules and hooks to simplify and enhance the use while preventing common mistakes.

    • Libraries

    Chat & Messaging

  • Build a one-on-one Android chat app using Kotlin - Build a one-one-one Android chat app in Kotlin within few minutes using CometChat Pro. This tutorial discusses the features such as login, getting list of contacts, user presence indicators, sending/receiving messages etc.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Aug 12th - Aug 18th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

REST

  • Retrofit - Retrofit turns your REST API into a Java interface.

    • Libraries

    Chat & Messaging

  • CometChat Voice, Video and Text Chat SDK with UIstars2 - Add voice, video and text chat to your app (and website) in minutes using CometChat. CometChat's SDK includes a complete ready UI so that you don't have to spend any time building one! That's not all, CometChat has out-of-the-box support for real-time translation, whiteboards, screen sharing, friends sync, role based access control, credits deduction and more.

    • Resources

  • Google Developers Training - Google Developers Official Training page has list of various useful learning resources for beginner as well seasoned developer.
  • AndroidVille - Become a better Android Engineer. A website dedicated to Android Development covering advanced topics such as RxJava, Android Zygote and much more.

    • Resources

    More lists of libraries

  • Square libraries - Multiple high quality libraries by square.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Aug 5th - Aug 11th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

GUI

  • SmoothOverscrollableScrollViewstars22 - Small custom view with smooth overscroll. You can add header with scale background

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Jun 24th - Jun 30th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

Payments

  • Square In-App Payments for Android - Integrate Square payments into your mobile app with Digital wallet and stored card support for quick checkout.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Jun 10th - Jun 16th, 2019
item.description:
Resources

Code examples

  • Kotlin VIPER examplestars25 - Example about VIPER (View Interactor Presenter Entity Router) Pattern.

    • Libraries

    GUI

  • MaterialProgressBarstars2.1k - Material design ProgressBar with consistent appearance.

    • Libraries

    Navigation

  • Debug-Artiststars45 - Debug menu to enable leakcanary, scalpel and others easy.

    • Libraries

    Maps

  • GLMap - Crossplatform offline vector map with MapCSS styling. Offline search and offline navigation are included.

    • Libraries

    Utility

  • Reactorstars35 - Reactor is a fast and secure key-value library for Android.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Apr 29th - May 5th, 2019
item.description:
Resources

Code examples

  • Kotlin MVVM examplestars315 - Example about MVVM (Model View ViewModel) Pattern.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Apr 22nd - Apr 28th, 2019
item.description:
Performance

  • Boosterstars3.4k - Booster is an optimization toolkit for Android applications.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Feb 25th - Mar 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Resources

  • Vogella Tutorials - Very good tutorials by Lars Vogel.

    • Development Alternatives

    Flutter

  • Flutter - Google's mobile app SDK for high-quality native interfaces for Android and iOS in very quick time.

    • Libraries

    Other

  • Tellerstars12 - Teller facilitates the downloading, saving, and reading of the cached data of your app. Keep your user's data fresh and remove those annoying loading screens!

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Jan 28th - Feb 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

Other

  • RxAndroidstars19.4k - Adds minimum RxJava bindings for easy writing of reactive Android java code.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Jan 21st - Jan 27th, 2019
item.description:

Game Development

  • Cocos2d-x - Cross-platform 2d game framework.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Jan 14th - Jan 20th, 2019
item.description:

Kotlin

  • Kotlin coding puzzlesstars394 - Set of programming challenges thats helps to improve whiteboard coding and problem-solving skills.

Other

  • Gradle buildSrcVersionsstars897 - A kotlin dsl to simplify dependencies management

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Dec 10th - Dec 16th, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

Utility

  • TimeItstars35 - A stopwatch library for android which makes it easy to start, pause, display and maintain multiple stopwatches in an app.

item.description:

Charts

  • AnyChartstars1.6k - Data visualization library, Interactive charts.

    • Libraries

    GUI

  • YuanaItemSettingViewstars14 - Customizable Item Setting View for Android.

    • Libraries

    Inputs

  • VoiceOverlaystars190 - An overlay that gets your user’s voice permission and input as text in a customizable UI.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Aug 13th - Aug 19th, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

Animations

  • Swipperstars89 - Android library for swipeable gestures to control volume , brightness and seek .

    • Libraries

    GUI

  • CrunchyCalendarstars466 - A material calendar widget with infinite scrolling, date range selection and color customization.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Jul 30th - Aug 5th, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

Debugging Tools

  • AppSpector - Remote Android and iOS debugging and data collection service. You can debug networking, logs, SQLite and mock device's geo location.

    • Resources

    More lists of libraries

  • Android Store - Search Android Libraries, Projects, and Tools.

    • Resources

  • Mindorks - Become a complete and happy Android developer.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Jul 23rd - Jul 29th, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

Security

  • Themisstars1.3k - Multi-language framework for making typical encryption schemes easy to use: data at rest, authenticated data exchange, transport protection, authentication, and so on.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Jul 16th - Jul 22nd, 2018
item.description:
Development Alternatives

C#

  • Xamarin - Framework to create native iOS, Android, Mac and Windows apps in C#.

    • Libraries

    Camera

  • Camerastars106 - Use Android camera to take pictures and videos, based on camera2 api.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android May 28th - Jun 3rd, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

Inputs

  • SweetPasswordstars17 - Password EditText that allows to custom toggle button

    • Resources

  • Android Weekly - Newsletter with weekly information about android.

    • Libraries

    Chat & Messaging

  • Kommunicate Live Chat SDKstars57 - Kommunicate provides open source live chat sdk in android. Kommunicate lets you add real time live chat and in-app messaging in your mobile (android, iOS) applications and website for customer support.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android May 7th - May 13th, 2018
item.description:
Development Alternatives

Kotlin

  • Koin - Lightweight dependency injection framework for Kotlin

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Apr 30th - May 6th, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

View Pagers

  • Material Dots Indicatorsstars2.2k - Three Material Dots Indicators styles for View Pagers.

    • Libraries

    Other

  • Android Support library - The Android Support Library package is a set of code libraries that provide backward-compatible versions of Android framework API.

    • Resources

  • Pencil Project - An open source prototyping software.
  • Device Art Generator - Wraps app screenshots in real device artwork.

    • Libraries

    Data binding

  • Data Binding Library - Official Android Data Binding Library to write declarative layouts and minimize the glue code necessary to bind application logic and layouts.

    • Libraries

    GUI

  • Pull to refresh - A swipe refresh layout is available in the v4 support library.
  • Flashbarstars1.6k - A highly customizable, powerful and easy-to-use alerting library for Android.

    • Libraries

    Networking

  • Android Volley - Official Android HTTP library that makes networking for easier and faster.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Apr 16th - Apr 22nd, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

Images

  • ShapeImageViewstars2.6k - Library to display images in different shapes.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Mar 26th - Apr 1st, 2018
item.description:

Kotlin

  • Android Clean Architecture - Kotlinstars318 - A base project using the Uncle Bob's clean architecture with Kotlin language and the latest Android technologies.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Mar 19th - Mar 25th, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

Logger

  • Logback Androidstars945 - Logback port to Android which provides a highly configurable logging framework for Android apps.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Mar 5th - Mar 11th, 2018
item.description:
Resources

  • Programming Community Curated Resources for Learning Android Development - Android Tutorials & Courses submitted and voted by the programming community.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Feb 26th - Mar 4th, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

Utility

  • Conceal SharedPreferencesstars95 - Secured Preferences using Facebook Secure Encryption called Conceal.

    • Libraries

    Other

  • Android Priority Job Queuestars3.4k - Implementation of a Job Queue to easily schedule jobs (tasks) that run in the background, improving UX and application stability.

    • Development Alternatives

    HTML, CSS and Javascript

  • Capacitorstars5.6k - Build cross-platform Native Progressive Web Apps for iOS, Android, and the web. Very promising Cordova alternative.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Jan 29th - Feb 4th, 2018
item.description:
How to Use

  • Simply press command + F to search for a keyword
  • Go through our Content Menu

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Jan 22nd - Jan 28th, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

Security

  • libsignal-protocol-javastars1.6k - A ratcheting forward secrecy protocol that works in synchronous and asynchronous messaging environments.

    • Libraries

    Debugging Tools

  • Pidcatstars4.4k - a colored command-line ADB wrapper that only shows log entries for a specific application package

    • Libraries

    GUI

  • ShowCaseViewstars296 - The ShowcaseView library is designed to highlight and showcase specific parts of apps to the user with a attractive and flat overlay.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Jan 15th - Jan 21st, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

Debugging Tools

  • ADB Enhancedstars826 - a command-line wrapper around ADB for developers, so that, developers don't have to remember esoteric version-dependent commands

item.description:

GUI

  • Easy-Signature-Androidstars23 - An simple ui library that provides a plugable signature view.

item.description:

HTML, CSS and Javascript

  • ArcChartViewstars98 - Draw Creative Statistic Arc Charts.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Nov 20th - Nov 26th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

GUI

  • SortableTableViewstars1k - An Android library containing a simple TableView and an advanced SortableTableView providing a lot of customisation possibilities to fit all needs.

    • Libraries

    Paginate

  • NoPaginatestars180 - Simple Android pagination library

    • Libraries

    Runtime Permissions

  • NoPermissionstars109 - Simple Android library for permissions request. Consists of only one class.

    • Libraries

    Utility

  • Validatorstars118 - An utilities class to validate text inside TextInputLayout.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Oct 30th - Nov 5th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

Android Services

  • Service Connectorstars10 - Bind Android services and callbacks to fields and methods.
  • Remoterstars53 - An alternative to Android AIDL for Android Remote IPC services using plain java interfaces.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Oct 16th - Oct 22nd, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

Other

  • Agile Boiler Platestars45 - The boiler plate is based on MVP architecture and it is fully based on Dependency Injection design pattern using Dagger2.

    • Libraries

    Field Validation

  • Convalidastars201 - A simple and annotation-based way to validate your input fields.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Oct 9th - Oct 15th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

Video

  • VideoPlayViewstars87 - Custom Android view with video player, play/stop, loader and placeholder image.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Oct 2nd - Oct 8th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

Video

  • Exoplayerstars17.6k - ExoPlayer is an application level media player for Android, allow playing audio and video both locally and over the Internet. Supports features like Dynamic adaptive streaming over HTTP (DASH), SmoothStreaming and Common Encryption

    • Libraries

    Debugging Tools

  • Android Debug Bridge - ADB - a command-line tool to assist in debugging Android-powered devices

    • Libraries

    Runtime Permissions

  • Permission Dispatcherstars10.6k - Simple annotation-based API to handle runtime permissions.
  • RxPermissionsstars10.1k - Android runtime permissions powered by RxJava.

    • Libraries

    Other

  • Flexbox Layoutstars16.7k - FlexboxLayout is a library which brings the similar capabilities of CSS Flexible Box Layout Module to Android. 
  • RxBindingstars9.6k- RxBinding – RxJava binding APIs for Android UI widgets from the platform and support libraries.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Sep 18th - Sep 24th, 2017
item.description:
Emulators

  • BlueStacks

    • Libraries

    Dependency Injection

  • Toothpickstars1.1k - A scope tree based Dependency Injection (DI) library for Java.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Aug 21st - Aug 27th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

Crash monitoring

  • Bugsnag - Cross platform error monitoring. Free tier. Support for SDK & NDK. Error reports include data on device, release, user, and allows arbitrary data.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Aug 7th - Aug 13th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

Game Development

  • JustWeEnginestars764 - An easy open source Android Native Game FrameWork.

item.description:

GUI

  • MultiSnapRecyclerViewstars2.2k - Android library for multiple snapping of RecyclerView
  • CircleProgressBarstars81 - A simple library for creating circular progressbars for Android.

    • Libraries

    Inputs

  • InputMaskstars1.1k - Pattern-based user input formatter, parser and validator.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Jul 24th - Jul 30th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

Navigation

  • RecyclerTabLayoutstars1.3k - An efficient TabLayout library implemented with RecyclerView.

    • Libraries

    Utility

  • Shutter-Androidstars52 - Capture photos/videos from device camera or get photos/video from gallery app with no runtime permissions needed.

    • Libraries

    GUI

  • ShimmerLayoutstars2.4k - Memory efficient shimmering effect for Android applications.

    • Resources

  • Android Hive Tutorials - Very good tutorials for beginners.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Jul 3rd - Jul 9th, 2017
item.description:

Animations

  • Spotlightstars2.9k - Android Library that lights items for tutorials or walk-throughs etc...

GUI

  • LGSnackbarstars47 - An easy to use and customisable wrapper of the native Android Snackbar which stays visible across multiple activities.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Jun 5th - Jun 11th, 2017
item.description:
Resources

  • Associate Android Developer Certification Materialsstars981 - A collection of materials for getting ready for the test.

    • Libraries

    GUI

  • MultiViewAdapterstars806 - Recyclerview Adapter library to create composable view holders.

    • Libraries

    Database

  • Nitrite Databasestars557 - A NoSQL embedded document store for Android with MongoDb like API.

    • Libraries

    Crash monitoring

  • Instabug - Bug reporting, Crash Reporting, In-app Feedback.

    • Development Alternatives

    HTML, CSS and Javascript

  • PhoneGap - Open source framework by Adobe to create cross platform mobile apps using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

    • Libraries

    Custom Dialog

  • Notystars138 - A simple library for creating animated alerts/dialogs/warnings.

    • Emulators

  • AndY

    • Libraries

    ORM

  • GreenDAO - Light & fast ORM solution.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android May 15th - May 21st, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

Animations

  • Reboundstars5.5k - Rebound is a Java library that models spring dynamics.

    • Libraries

    Loading Images

  • Glidestars31.1k - An image loading and caching library for Android focused on smooth scrolling, Recommended by Google.

    • Libraries

    Media Picker

  • MediaPickerstars256 - Android Library that lets you to select multiple images, video or voice for Android

    • Libraries

    Crash monitoring

  • Splunk MINT - Monitoring, Crash Reports, Real time data, Statistic.

    • Libraries

    Database

  • Realm Asset Helperstars30 - Copies a realm database from the apk assets folder. Efficiently handles versioning of read-only realm databases.

    • Libraries

    Tracking

  • CleverTap - Analytics platform and user-engagement platform with 1 million free events

    • Libraries

    Custom Dialog

  • MediaRecorderDialogstars73 - Custom Dialog to record audio, store it and play it in your phone.

    • Development Alternatives

    Kotlin

  • Kotterknifestars2.3k - Android view injection written in Kotlin based on ButterKnife
  • Android Kotlin Samplesstars282 - Some basic Android code samples written in Kotlin.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android May 1st - May 7th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

JSON

  • Moshistars7.3k - A modern JSON library for Android and Java.

    • Libraries

    Camera

  • MagicalCamerastars328 - Simple way to take or select photos of your gallery, with other features for manage pictures.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Apr 24th - Apr 30th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

Date & Time

  • Joda-Time Androidstars2.5k - Joda-Time library with Android specialization.
  • ThreeTen Android Backportstars3.4k - An adaptation of the JSR-310 backport for Android.
  • True Timestars1.1k - Android NTP time library. Get the true current time impervious to device clock time changes.

    • Libraries

    GUI

  • Litho (By Facebook)stars7.2k - A declarative framework for building efficient UIs on Android.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Apr 10th - Apr 16th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

Logger

  • Bugfenderstars37 - Upload your logs and check them online, specially made for mobile

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Apr 3rd - Apr 9th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

Logger

  • EzyLoggerstars7 - Simple Lightweight logger

    • Libraries

    Other

  • RateMeMaybestars97 - Asks the user if (s)he wants to open the Play Store to rate your application.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Mar 20th - Mar 26th, 2017
item.description:
Resources

  • Android Design in Action Video series The video series by Android Design Team of Google.
  • Android DevBytes Video Series - It is the technical counterpart of Android Design in Action series.
  • Android UI design resources - Gives you wide variety of design resources form a Google Developer Expert in UI/UX.

    • Resources

    Podcasts

  • Android Developers Backstage is a podcast by and for Android developers. Hosted by developers from the Android engineering team, this show covers topics of interest to Android programmers, with in-depth discussions and interviews with engineers on the Android team at Google.
  • Android Dialogs is a video based podcast, where they have bite-sized conversations with people from the Android community.
  • The Contextstars637 a podcast about Android Development with Hannes Dorfmann, Artem Zinnatullin and wonderful guests!

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Feb 27th - Mar 5th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

Logger

  • loggerstars12.8k - Simple, pretty and powerful logger for android
  • timberstars8.9k - A logger with a small, extensible API which provides utility on top of Android's normal Log class.
  • LoggingInterceptorstars1.2k - An OkHttp interceptor which pretty logs request and response data.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Feb 13th - Feb 19th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

Cloud Services

  • CloudRail - Unified API Library for: Cloud Storage, Social Profiles, Payment, Email, SMS & POIs.

    • Libraries

    Dependency Injection

  • ActivityStarterstars417 - Android Library that provide simpler way to start the Activities with multiple arguments.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Jan 30th - Feb 5th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries

Video

  • ijkplayerstars28.8k - Android/iOS video player based on FFmpeg n3.2, with MediaCodec, VideoToolbox support.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Jan 23rd - Jan 29th, 2017
item.description:
Resources

  • Developing for Android - A series of articles from Googler Chet Hasae and others, answering most commonly asked question: "What are some of the important rules to keep in mind when developing Android applications?".

  • Spring for Android - Rest Templatestars715 - A Rest Client for Android.

item.description:

GUI

  • TapTargetViewstars5k - An implementation of tap targets from the Material Design guidelines for feature discovery.

  • Android Tips & Tricksstars4.4k - Cheatsheet about tips and tricks for Android Development.

    • Libraries

    Other

  • Senseystars2.6k - Detecting gestures in a snap.

    • Libraries

    Utility

  • EasyDeviceInfostars1.7k - Get device information in a super easy way.

item.title: JStumpp/awesome-android Sep 12th - Sep 18th, 2016
item.description:
Libraries

Chat & Messaging
